mapper.select:
SELECT ac.apt_cmplex_no AS aptCmplexNo, ac.apt_cmplex_nm AS aptCmplexNm, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM apt_detail ad INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no ) AS totalUnitCnt, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT hh.ho_no) FROM hshld_head hh INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_no = hh.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no
AND hh.inout_cd = 'LIVE' ) AS occupiedCnt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM apt_detail ad INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hshld_head hh WHERE hh.ho_no = ad.ho_no AND hh.inout_cd = 'LIVE' ) ) AS emptyCnt, ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(
SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hshld_head hh WHERE hh.ho_no = ad.ho_no AND hh.inout_cd = 'LIVE' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*), 1) END FROM apt_detail ad INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no ) AS occupancyRate, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT au.dong_no) FROM apt_unit au WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = ac.apt_cmplex_no ) AS dongCnt FROM apt_complex ac WHERE ac.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}

WITH meter_code AS ( SELECT 'ELC' AS meter_ty_cd, '전기' AS meter_ty_nm, 'kWh' AS unit_nm, 1 AS sort_no FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'WTR', '수도', '㎥', 2 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT 'GAS', '가스', '㎥', 3 FROM dual ), latest_meter AS ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ad.ho_no, f.facility_ty_cd, NVL(m.curr_val, 0) - NVL(m.pre_val, 0) AS usage_val, m.meter_rslt_cd, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ad.ho_no, f.facility_ty_cd ORDER BY m.meter_dt DESC, m.meter_hstry_no DESC ) AS rn FROM meter_hstry m INNER JOIN facility f ON f.facility_no = m.facility_no INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_no = m.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON au.dong_no = ad.dong_no WHERE au.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND f.facility_ty_cd IN ('ELC', 'WTR', 'GAS') ) WHERE rn = 1 ) SELECT mc.meter_ty_cd AS meterTyCd, mc.meter_ty_nm AS meterTyNm, mc.unit_nm AS unitNm, NVL(COUNT(lm.ho_no), 0) AS hshldCnt, NVL(ROUND(AVG(lm.usage_val), 0), 0) AS avgUsage, NVL(MIN(lm.usage_val), 0) AS minUsage, NVL(MAX(lm.usage_val), 0) AS maxUsage, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN lm.meter_rslt_cd = 'NORMAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS normalCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN lm.meter_rslt_cd = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS errorCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN lm.meter_rslt_cd = 'MISS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS missCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN lm.meter_rslt_cd = 'CHECK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS checkCnt FROM meter_code mc LEFT JOIN latest_meter lm ON lm.facility_ty_cd = mc.meter_ty_cd GROUP BY mc.meter_ty_cd, mc.meter_ty_nm, mc.unit_nm, mc.sort_no ORDER BY mc.sort_no

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cvpl_stts_cd = 'APLY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS appliedCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cvpl_stts_cd IN ('RCPT', 'POCS') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS processingCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cvpl_stts_cd = 'END' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS doneCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN cvpl_stts_cd = 'CNCL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cancelCnt, NVL(ROUND( AVG(CASE WHEN cvpl_stts_cd = 'END' AND cvpl_end_dt IS NOT NULL AND cvpl_reg_dt IS NOT NULL THEN cvpl_end_dt - cvpl_reg_dt END ), 1 ), 0) AS avgProcessDays FROM cvpl WHERE apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}

SELECT c.cvpl_ty_cd AS itemCd, NVL(cc.code_name, c.cvpl_ty_cd) AS itemNm, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM cvpl c LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON cc.group_code_no = 'CVPL_TY' AND cc.code_no_cd = c.cvpl_ty_cd AND cc.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE c.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND c.cvpl_ty_cd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.cvpl_ty_cd, cc.code_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

SELECT facilityNm, reservationCnt, ROWNUM AS rank FROM ( SELECT pf.cmn_facility_nm AS facilityNm, COUNT(*) AS reservationCnt FROM facility_hstry fh INNER JOIN public_item pi ON pi.cmn_facility_item_no = fh.cmn_facility_item_no INNER JOIN public_facility pf ON pf.cmn_facility_no = pi.cmn_facility_no WHERE pf.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND fh.rsvt_stts_cd IN ('PENDING', 'APPROVED') AND fh.rsvt_dt >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND fh.rsvt_dt < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) GROUP BY pf.cmn_facility_nm ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, pf.cmn_facility_nm ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN fch.chk_stts_cd = 'WAIT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN fch.chk_stts_cd = 'ING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS inProgressCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN fch.chk_stts_cd IN ('DONE', 'FAULT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS doneCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(fch.use_restrict_yn, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS restrictedCnt FROM facility_check_hstry fch INNER JOIN facility f ON f.facility_no = fch.facility_no WHERE f.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS activeCnt, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN NVL(use_yn, 'Y') = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS inactiveCnt FROM partner WHERE apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo}
SELECT biz_ty_nm AS itemCd, biz_ty_nm AS itemNm, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM partner WHERE apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND biz_ty_nm IS NOT NULL GROUP BY biz_ty_nm ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
